name: nas_calendar
label: NAS Calendar
description: Read, add, or delete calendar events on the self-hosted Radicale CalDAV server. The user has MULTIPLE calendars (e.g. Doctor Bella, SAP OUTLOOK, F1 2026). ALWAYS specify which calendar via the 'calendar' parameter (case-insensitive substring of the display name). If unsure which calendar the user means, first call action=list_calendars, then ASK the user to pick — do NOT guess. Requires CALDAV_URL (principal URL), CALDAV_USER, CALDAV_PASS on the server.

action.description: list_calendars: enumerate all calendars. list: read events from one calendar (requires 'calendar'). add: create event (requires 'calendar', 'summary', 'start'). delete: remove event (requires 'calendar', 'uid').

calendar.description: Case-insensitive substring of the target calendar's display name. Required for list/add/delete. Must match exactly one calendar; ambiguous or zero matches return an error listing candidates so you can ask the user.

start.description: ISO 8601 start datetime, e.g. 2026-07-16T14:00:00. Required for 'add'.

end.description: ISO 8601 end datetime. Optional for 'add'; defaults to start + 1h.

uid.description: Event UID (returned by 'add' or 'list'). Required for 'delete'.
